recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

recommendations.title: San Andreas Quake
recommendations.overview: When a discredited L.A. Seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake, no one takes her seriously. Now on her own, she races desperately to get her family to safety before the earthquake breaks Los Angeles apart from the mainland.

recommendations.title: Pandora
recommendations.overview: When an earthquake hits a Korean village housing a run-down nuclear power plant, a man risks his life to save the country from imminent disaster.

recommendations.title: Earthquake
recommendations.overview: Various interconnected people struggle to survive when an earthquake of unimaginable magnitude hits Los Angeles, California.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: OMG: Oh My God!
recommendations.overview: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Asadas!
recommendations.overview: Masashi is a photographer. He has his parents and an older brother Yukihiro. Through the 2011 Tohoku earthquake and tsunami, Masashi begins to take staged photos of his family.

recommendations.title: Life, and Nothing More…
recommendations.overview: After the earthquake of Guilan, a film director and his son travel to the devastated area to search for the actors from the movie the director made there a few years previously. In their search, they see how people who have lost everything in the ear

recommendations.title: Badland Hunters
recommendations.overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.
